title: BorylXAT-DB: A DFT transition-state database for Lewis base activated boryl-radical C-Cl activation
description: BorylXAT-DB contains DFT-derived structures, thermodynamic and kinetic parameters, reaction mappings, electronic descriptors, and transition-state validation information for Lewis base activated boryl-radical mediated C-Cl activation. The release provides ASE SQLite and Parquet data products together with analysis and modeling code.
